title: habenaria celebica
intro: Habenaria celebica, also known as the Celestial Habenaria, is a species of orchid found in tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Habenaria celebica is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, and can also be used in herbal teas and supplements.
